short_description: This command writes logic instances for SNPS flow
full_help:
write_readback_instances

Description: 
This command writes logic instances for SNPS flow

Syntax: 
write_readback_instances  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories:
